subcodes.first_line: Your letter was received. According to the explicit text of the Blessed Beauty, the beloved friends must not interfere in political affairs, but rather they should [3.5s]... ...If it should happen that one of the friends be called upon to serve his country and people in some capacity, he should apply himself to his work with heart and soul
subcodes.first_line_orig: نامه شما رسید بنص قاطع جمال مبارک احباء در امور سیاسی مداخله ندارند بلکه باید
subcodes.subjects: @obedience to and respect for government authority, @non-participation in politics, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
